---
title: E. Reference data
---

Provide the two reference files the pipeline needs for your site: the
**`model.json`** (use the provided default for now) and the **`mappers.xlsx`**
(start from the template and fill it in for your site).

::: {.callout-note}
## Coming soon
This page is part of the manual's skeleton. Its content is being written in
[issue #9](https://github.com/JeroenUMC/bp-sweden-web/issues/9) (model.json) and
[issue #10](https://github.com/JeroenUMC/bp-sweden-web/issues/10) (mappers.xlsx).
:::
